---
title: "Zhuojin Li Chris"
image: "zhengjianzhao.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:zhl232@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/your_username
    - icon: github
      href: https://github.com/your_username
---

Welcome to my website!

I am a student at **UC San Diego** interested in **data science, machine learning, causal inference, and business analytics**.

## Research Interests

- Machine Learning
- Uplift Modeling
- Causal Inference
- Data Analysis
- Business Analytics

## Education

**University of California, San Diego**
Your degree / major here
Expected graduation: 20XX

## Selected Work

I use this site to share my academic background, project portfolio, and technical work.
